diagrams.title: Virtual Function Call Mechanism
diagrams.description: Shows how virtual function calls are resolved at runtime using vtable and vptr
diagrams.purpose: Understanding dynamic binding and runtime polymorphism mechanism

diagrams.title: Class Hierarchy with Virtual Functions
diagrams.description: UML-like diagram showing base class with virtual function and derived class overrides
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how override works in inheritance hierarchy

diagrams.title: Slicing vs Polymorphism
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing object slicing versus proper polymorphic behavior
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the importance of pointers/references for polymorphism
